creatures.name: Mist Stalker
creatures.description: A shadowy predator from the shallow mist, moving with predatory grace

creatures.name: Bone Hound
creatures.description: A skeletal creature bound together by sinew and malice, howling with otherworldly anguish

creatures.name: Whisper Swarm
creatures.description: A cloud of incorporeal voices that sing of forgotten things and lost names

creatures.name: Stone Warden
creatures.description: A massive creature of animated stone and ancient earth, slow but implacable
